overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a forest trail. The character travels through a moody woodland environment with stone walls, wooden fences, and rocky outcrops under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone wall boundary

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with two swords strapped to his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: weathered gray stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
tall dead tree with bare branches visible beyond the stone wall
dense cluster of tall pine trees forming the forest canopy
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass and gravel

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a stone wall on the left and dense pine forest on the right. The path winds through the woodland under diffused afternoon light filtering through the canopy, with the stone wall providing a constant boundary marker.

events.description: stone wall transitions to rustic wooden fence on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest trail at a steady pace, passing by the wooden fence

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence made of rough-hewn logs and posts replacing the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the forest as the stone wall gives way to a rustic wooden fence on the left. The path remains surrounded by dense vegetation and tall pine trees, with the ground showing patches of sunlight filtering through the canopy.

events.description: wooden fence ends and large moss-covered rock outcrops appear on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through a more open section of forest with rocky terrain visible to the right

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder and rock formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens slightly as wooden fencing disappears, revealing large moss-covered rock formations on the right. The trail continues through mixed forest terrain with varied vegetation and scattered boulders, creating a more rugged wilderness atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with returning stone boundary

events.description: stone wall returns on the left side of the path as the trail continues

agents.ego_description: approaching a more defined path section with the stone wall returning on the left

entered.detail: weathered gray stone wall reappearing along the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The stone wall reappears on the left as Geralt continues along the winding path. Large rocks remain visible in the mid-distance on the right while the trail leads deeper into the forest, with the environment becoming more enclosed again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a woodland trail that transitions from a stone-bordered path to one lined by rustic fencing. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail, where a steady stone wall on the left serves as a boundary against the dense pine forest on the right. As the camera advances through the diffused afternoon light filtering through the canopy, the stone wall gradually gives way to a weathered wooden fence. The scene then continues deeper into the vegetation, where the surrounding pine trees remain dense while the ground shifts to reveal scattered patches of sunlight.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transitions from an open, rugged wilderness back into a more enclosed woodland path. It begins as the wooden fencing disappears, opening the view to large moss-covered rock formations and scattered boulders on the right. As the camera moves forward through the mixed forest terrain, the landscape feels increasingly wild and varied in its vegetation. The scene then shifts as a stone wall reappears on the left, guiding the path deeper into the woods. Finally, the trail winds forward, leaving the large rocks in the mid-distance as the surrounding forest closes in once more.
